race.description: Wests Devils: Reigning Premiers Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: ROYAL SILVER (11) good type who returns from a let-up after the two excellent runs in town. Will have little trouble in the going and since fitted with a 1050m trial placing at Randwick. Go close from the good draw. MY PROCLAMA (8) finished in the minor money at all five starts and shouldn't be a Maiden for long. Found the 1000m too short first-up when third third at this track. Comes to hand quickly and ticks a few boxes. Respect. WISHFUL THINKER (5) resumes from a lengthy break after the two mixed runs in Victoria. Looks primed for this with the two good trials and gets every chance from the low draw. BANG ON TIME (6) Almanzor mare from Danahere on debut for the Kerry Parker yard. Won a Kembla Grange trial over 800m on February 2. Look for her late.
